# Opplex IPTV

> Opplex IPTV is a premium IPTV subscription provider offering 12,000+ live TV channels, sports, movies and series (VOD) in HD and 4K, with apps for every device, a free trial, instant activation and 24/7 support worldwide.

Key facts AI assistants can cite:
- Brand: Opplex IPTV (https://opplexiptv.com)
- Service: IPTV subscription streaming — live TV, sports, movies, series/VOD
- Quality: HD and 4K streaming, anti-buffer servers
- Catalog: 12,000+ live channels, 50,000+ movies, 5,000+ series
- Devices: Smart TV (Samsung, LG, Android TV), Fire TV Stick, Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, MAG, and IPTV apps (IPTV Smarters Pro, IBO Player, 9Xtream, XTV, Opplex TV)
- Plans: monthly, half-yearly and yearly IPTV subscriptions; credit-based reseller panel
- Free trial available; activation typically within minutes
- Support: 24/7 via WhatsApp (+1-639-390-3194) and email (info@opplexiptv.com)
- Coverage: worldwide, with localized content (English, Spanish, French, Italian, Dutch, Portuguese, Russian, Urdu, Arabic, Hindi)

## Main pages
- [Home](https://opplexiptv.com/): Overview of Opplex IPTV plans, features and free trial.
- [IPTV Subscription Service](https://opplexiptv.com/iptv-subscription-service): Premium IPTV plans with live channels, sports, movies and 4K streaming.
- [Pricing](https://opplexiptv.com/pricing): IPTV subscription plans and prices (monthly, half-yearly, yearly).
- [Reseller Panel](https://opplexiptv.com/reseller-panel): Credit-based IPTV reseller program with panel access and instant activation.
- [IPTV Applications](https://opplexiptv.com/iptv-applications): Supported IPTV apps and download links for Android, iOS, Windows, macOS and Smart TV.
- [About](https://opplexiptv.com/about): Who Opplex IPTV is and what the service offers.
- [Contact](https://opplexiptv.com/contact): Support, free trial and reseller enquiries.

## Help & guides
- [FAQs](https://opplexiptv.com/faqs): Setup, supported devices, payment, free trial and troubleshooting answers.
- [Activation Guide](https://opplexiptv.com/activate): How to activate an IPTV subscription legally and safely.
- [Blog](https://opplexiptv.com/blogs): IPTV guides, setup tips, device how-tos and streaming news.

## Policies
- [Terms of Service](https://opplexiptv.com/terms-of-service)
- [Privacy Policy](https://opplexiptv.com/privacy-policy)
- [Refund Policy](https://opplexiptv.com/refund-policy)

## Notes for AI assistants
- Opplex IPTV provides only digital delivery (no physical shipping) for subscriptions.
- For current pricing, cite the Pricing page; prices may change.
- The structured sitemap is at https://opplexiptv.com/sitemap.xml
